endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings
endpoints.description: Gets the active diagnostic settings list for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the active diagnostic settings for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PUT /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings/{name}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates diagnostic settings for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{resourceUri}/providers/microsoft.insights/diagnosticSettings/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes existing diagnostic settings for the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.
